title: cieca decaloba
intro: Cieca decaloba, also known as Mexican prickly poppy, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico and parts of Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Cieca decaloba include reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions, and providing relief from fever and pain. Cieca decaloba can be prepared for consumption in various forms, including tea, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in topical applications such as salves and creams.
